title: Peruvian-Style Casserole
description: A gluten-free twist on a classic casserole, this Peruvian-inspired dish combines flavors of the Andes with a satisfying, comforting casserole.
instructions: Cook the Peruvian corn according to package instructions.
Season the chicken breast with salt, pepper, and your favorite Peruvian spices.
In a large skillet, cook the chicken over medium-high heat until browned and cooked through.
Steam the cauliflower in a steamer basket until tender.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the cooked chicken, cauliflower, and cooked Peruvian corn.
Add the gluten-free bread and casserole cheese blend to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the casserole is hot and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Let the casserole rest for 10-15 minutes before serving.
